      .getState()

        makeTimelineTrack({ id: 'track-a1', name: 'A1', kind: 'audio', order: 1 }),
      ])
    useItemsStore
      .getState()
      .setItems([
        makeTimelineVideoItem({ id: 'a' }),
        makeTimelineVideoItem({ id: 'b', from: 60 }),
        makeTimelineAudioItem({ id: 'audio-1' }),
      ]
